summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Granular Permission System (Inflow Cloud style). All 12 backend tests passed, all frontend UI features verified working end-to-end. Permission changes persist correctly to the database.

minor.issue: Duplicate PUT endpoint definitions at lines 3404 and 3505 in server.py - FastAPI uses first one, but duplicate should be removed for code clarity

passed_tests: BACKEND TESTS (12/12 passed):
- GET /api/permissions/modules returns all 12 permission modules with labels and actions
- GET /api/permissions/presets returns all 4 role presets (admin, manager, cashier, inventory_clerk)
- GET /api/permissions/presets/{key} returns specific preset details
- GET /api/permissions/presets/{invalid} returns 404
- GET /api/users returns list of users
- GET /api/users/{user_id}/permissions returns user permissions
- PUT /api/users/{user_id}/permissions updates user permissions
- POST /api/users/{user_id}/apply-preset applies preset permissions
- POST /api/users/{user_id}/apply-preset with invalid preset returns 400
- PUT /api/users/{user_id}/permissions/module/{module} updates specific module
- PUT /api/users/{user_id}/permissions/module/{invalid} returns 400
- Permission changes persist correctly in database
FRONTEND TESTS (all passed):
- User Permissions page loads correctly at /user-permissions
- Users list displays correctly showing admin and cashier users
- Clicking a user selects them (highlighted with green left border)
- Permission editor shows selected user's permissions
- 53 permission switches found across 12 modules
- Permission toggles work correctly (state changes on click)
- 'You have unsaved changes' indicator appears after modifications
- Apply Preset dropdown shows all 4 presets (Administrator, Branch Manager, Cashier, Inventory Clerk)
- Module-level 'None' button sets all module permissions to false
- Module-level 'All' button sets all module permissions to true
- 12 'None' buttons and 12 'All' buttons found (one per module)
- Save permissions button saves to backend (shows 'Permissions saved' toast)
- Discard changes button reverts modifications
- Permission changes persist after page refresh (verified with integration test)
action_items: LOW PRIORITY: Remove duplicate PUT /users/{user_id}/permissions endpoint at line 3505 in server.py (line 3404 is already handling this)
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate endpoint definitions at lines 3404 and 3505 for PUT /api/users/{user_id}/permissions - only the first one (3404) is used by FastAPI. Remove line 3505-3526 to clean up code.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_user_permissions.py - Created comprehensive test suite for permission system
seed_data_creation: Used existing users: admin (Administrator), cashier1 (Test Cashier)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Permission system fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/permissions/modules (returns 12 modules), GET /api/permissions/presets (4 presets), PUT /api/users/{id}/permissions (update all), PUT /api/users/{id}/permissions/module/{module} (update specific module), POST /api/users/{id}/apply-preset (apply preset). Frontend page at /user-permissions has data-testids: user-item-{username}, save-permissions-btn, discard-changes-btn. Users panel shows users list, clicking selects user and loads permissions in editor panel. 53 switches total across 12 modules. Presets: admin, manager, cashier, inventory_clerk.
